title: "Bello" Plastic Dimple 27cm Plate Perfect for Parties & BBQs
features: Bello Dimple 27cm Plate - 1 Plate OUTDOOR DINING: The Bello dimple plate is great for outdoor dining such as BBQs, parties & get-togethers. You can use these plates to serve your food as a platter or use them as you would standard ceramic plates and serve your guests meals individually.
GENEROUS SIZE: The plates measure 27cm in diameter, so are a perfect size for a generous plate of food or ideal as a serving plate.
HIGH QUALITY: Made from high quality re-usable plastic, you can be sure that your new plates will last and are durable enough to withstand serving a variety of foods.

RE-USABLE: Although the plates are plastic, rather than throw them away you can reuse them regularly. They are easy to clean and will save you money in the long run rather than continuing to buy disposable plates.
PART OF A SET: These plates are part of our Bello Dimple range, you can find matching dining items in our store
